arts.ttl: Video: Calafiori scores stunner on full Arsenal debut against Man City
arts.sum: Italy international Riccardo Calafiori scored a stunner on his full debut for Arsenal in their...

arts.ttl: Rodri left in tears during Arsenal clash as Pep Guardiola's Man City gamble backfires
arts.sum: Manchester City midfielder Rodri was replaced by Mateo Kovacic in the first half of the Premier League clash with Arsenal at the Etihad Stadium

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola furiously KICKS his seat after controversy in Man City vs Arsenal clash
arts.sum: Manchester City enjoyed a perfect start to their crucial clash with Arsenal through Erling Haaland but the reigning champions were left furious after Riccardo Calafiori's stunning equaliser

arts.ttl: Manchester City superstar Rodri forced off with serious-looking knee injury in first half of bumper clash against Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City talisman Rodri was forced off with an injury against Arsenal in worrying scenes.

It remains to be seen if Arsenal will look to sign the Villarreal winger during the January transfer window, but they have been linked with a move for several months and a deal next summer is certainly plausible. Pino has been linked with multiple top Premier League clubs over the past few years and Arsenal are looking to complete a deal for the Spaniard amid Gabriel Martinelli ’s recent lack of form.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane's Arsenal claim speaks volumes in subtle dig at Mikel Arteta
arts.sum: Arsenal take on Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium on Sunday afternoon knowing they need a result as they try and end City's four-year winning streak in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Why Kevin De Bruyne is not playing for Man City vs Arsenal as Pep Guardiola dealt huge blow
arts.sum: This change is one of three made from the team that drew with Inter in the Champions League, as the manager largely sticks with the players that have contributed to City's unbeaten run so far this season. Kevin De Bruyne has been ruled out of Manchester City's squad after failing to recover from an injury he picked up against Inter.

arts.ttl: Kai Havertz escapes red card after incident FOUR seconds into Man City vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City's Premier League clash with Arsenal was halted after just a matter of seconds as Gunners forward Kai Havertz collided with Rodri just after kick-off at the Etihad

arts.ttl: Haaland becomes 19th man to 100 City goals
arts.sum: He scored 52 goals in his first season at the Etihad Stadium – more than any Premier League player has ever managed in a single term and the most ever by a City player in our long history. Erling Haaland has become the 19th player to score 100 goals for Manchester City, requiring just 105 matches to hit the landmark.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta explains Ben White absence from Arsenal XI as star makes debut vs Man City
arts.sum: There was only a place among the subsitutes for Ben White as Riccardo Calafiori earns his first Arsenal start in the Premier League against Manchester City
